description_long: This is a weathered metallic cup with a cylindrical body and a slightly flared rim. The surface is marked by a rough, matte finish with visible signs of wear, scratches, and some faint embossed symbols or runes around the upper section. A sturdy, riveted handle is attached to one side, and the base is reinforced with a band featuring evenly spaced rivets. The interior appears to be the same metal as the exterior, showing a consistent, aged patina. The cup's utilitarian design and robust construction suggest it is built for durability, possibly for use in rugged urban or industrial environments.
description: A rugged, weathered metal cup with a riveted handle and embossed markings, showing signs of heavy use and age.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cup's main body with embossed symbols and a reinforced base, handle not visible.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals the handle on the right and more of the embossed markings on the cup's surface.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the full length of the riveted handle and the reinforced base band.
description_view_3: Side view displays the handle on the left and additional surface markings, with the cup's cylindrical shape evident.
